description: A Timestream database resource containing tables for time series data storage.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name that uniquely identifies this database.

DatabaseName.description: The name of the Timestream database.

TableCount.description: The total number of tables found within the Timestream database.

KmsKeyId.description: The identifier of the KMS key used to encrypt the data stored in the database.

CreationTime.description: The time when the database was created.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The last time that this database was updated.

title: Database
